allow: Bash(grep -rn "migrate deploy\\|db push\\|prisma migrate\\|prisma db" package.json railway.json railway.toml nixpacks.toml Procfile Dockerfile)
Bash(ls -1 railway.json railway.toml nixpacks.toml Procfile Dockerfile)
Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./railway.json'\); console.log\('valid JSON. startCommand =>', c.deploy.startCommand\)")
